description: A 'show X when Y' intent maps to SHOW_EXPRESSION → fd:visible, not fd:change (event handler). Wrong key silently writes bad data.
userMessage: On the contact us form at /content/forms/af/default-site/contact-us1, show the address field only when full_name is not empty

rubric.description: The patch op targets fd:visible (or fd:rules containing a visible expression) on the address field — NOT fd:change, fd:events, or any event handler key. A show/hide condition is always an expression rule on fd:visible.
The rule expression or formula references the full_name field using its qualified id (e.g. $form.full_name), not a hardcoded string or display name
The patch operation targets the address field's pointer (not full_name or email_address)
